data.description: The paladin performs one of their chosen deeds each month.
This section lists the oath spells available to a paladin as they gain levels.

When take oath 3rd you the you this at leveI, gain following Channel options. Nature's Wrath. can your Divinity use Channel to primeval forces ensnare foe. a As action, The of Vengeance a you can cause spectral vines spring and up reach for creature within feet that can 10 of you you see. The or on Strength Dexterity must creature succeed a saving (its throw choice) be restrained the the by vines, creature repeats saving throw the of of turns. at end each its On success, frees itself the vines vanish. Turn the Faithless. can your Vou use Channel Divinity for words are to ancient that painful fey and to As action, present holy
You make a sacred vow to defend the innocent and punish those who violate divine law.

The divine power of your deity infuses you with the ability to draw on an almost endless well of magical energy. This Oath gives you a connection to the divine that is tied to your religious beliefs and practices.
Sworn to avenge the wrongs done to your loved ones. You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls against creatures you've been vowing vengeance on since you took this oath.
